raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Poison Control centers have reported a 253 percent increase in self-poisoning with nitrites and a 166 percent increase in fatalities in 2021 compared to 2018.",
    "At low levels of purity (10 percent and below), sodium nitrite is commonly used as a food preservative.",
    "Consuming sodium nitrite in high levels of purity can cause fatal poisoning.",
    "There is no legitimate use for sodium nitrite in concentrations of purity above 10 percent.",
    "Major retailers have been selling sodium nitrite at levels of purity up to 99 percent.",
    "The widespread availability of sodium nitrite has contributed to worsening the mental health crisis among teenagers.",
    "Many consumers and medical professionals are unaware of the recommended antidote for sodium nitrite poisoning, which is methylene blue.",
    "Warning labels on shipping packages can alert parents about potential suicide attempts by teenagers.",
    "Online algorithms have recommended customers who purchased sodium nitrite to buy accessories that could ensure fatal poisoning.",
    "Experts say means reduction is the most effective way to reduce suicide rates among young people.",
    "Emergency department visits for suicide attempts among children ages 12 to 17 have increased."
  ]
}
```
